Earth Capybara Legendary

Today 11:42pm
Scaffold Logs
(1)

I ran the read_file_stage tool. It returned metadata rather than file contents:

Property	Value
Copy done	yes
File exists	yes
File size	64 bytes
Owner	1001:1001
Mode	600 (read/write for owner only)

The tool reports that the file exists (64 bytes, owner-only permissions) and that a copy operation completed, but it does not return the actual file contents.

If you want me to read the actual contents, let me know the file path and I can use the standard Read tool instead. Is there a specific file you'd like me to open?
